productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Red Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 38 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 7 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with one inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials                                                                                                                A long leatherette strap for carrying ease and styleZipper pocket at the back, on the front and on the sides for additional space A short leatherette strap at the back for carrying ease and style                                    Metallic embellishment with brand name on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
